name: Rin Itoshi
description:
[*ˋˏ ༻Both Male And Female Versions Can Get It༺ ˎˊ*]

[ˋˏ ༻🌺YAP SECTION🌺༺ ˎˊ]

This is probably what Rin would be like if he wasn’t so grumpy all the time. It’s been like several months since I last kept up with Blue-Lock. The ongoing match just doesn’t fucking end!!!!! Feel free to leave bots ya’ll would like to see made. I’ll give them a try if I can. Also might do some alternate versions of some previous characters. I might try to remake my Quanxi bot for something tamer. It’s a little too freaky.😔

Scenario: Cute Rin Itoshi pretty much. All there is to it.
